Feature.subtitle: I create modern websites and apps with that underground touch

About.title: About me:
About.description:
Full-Stack Developer with focus on Front-End, solid experience in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma and PostgreSQL. Specialized in landing pages, websites and microsystems, with REST APIs integration, authentication and microservices, prioritizing performance, SEO and accessibility.

Leader of Konbini Code, micro-agency where I develop scalable digital solutions remotely, serving clients with focus on efficiency.

Previous experience in operations and tourism, with strong ability in adaptation, teamwork and effective communication in multicultural environments. Studying Technology in Information Security, with emphasis on cybersecurity, cryptography and web/mobile security, complementing my work in systems protection.

items.viptechStore: E-commerce developed with Next.js and TypeScript.
